underlying_goal: Extend a DLP rule engine playground with new entities and multi-rule support, debug entity grouping in scan responses, and fix the underlying gen3 rule engine bug causing incorrect per-event entity grouping
friction_detail: Claude twice misidentified the entity grouping structure in scanner.py/render.py, flip-flopping between per-event and per-entity chunking before settling on the correct approach.
brief_summary: User wanted to add DLP entities, test/document them, debug entity-grouping in scan output, fix the root-cause gen3 engine bug, and add multi-rule support; nearly all delivered though the playground rendering fix required several iterations and the nsdlp binary couldn't be fully verified live.
